metrolink: Due to an earlier failed vehicle we are expriencing a networkwide minor delay. Metrolink apologises for any inconvenience caused to your journey.
headlines: The Y2K bug is back! Danish dev digs up untimely flaw in old BSD build

crew_quote: "You know, with it being 19 degrees and all, I reckon we should celebrate by ordering a curry and pretending the Y2K bug is just a bad take on Lister's cooking!"
